narrative:
Granville Village C (precinct in Licking County) has 1,264 registered voters, with 77.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.1 percentage points.
